personalInfo.name: Nandini Kumari Biswal
personalInfo.bio: I build practical software with a strong interest in AI/ML, problem solving, and clean user experiences. Currently pursuing B.Tech CSE at KIIT University.

projects.title: Weather Notifier
projects.desc: Real-time weather checker with city-based search, live data cards, and desktop reminders.
features: Live weather retrieval by city using OpenWeatherMap API
Desktop-friendly Tkinter interface for quick access
Notification-focused design for daily weather updates
Simple and responsive weather data presentation

projects.title: Python Messenger App
projects.desc: Desktop chat application built on client-server architecture with support for multiple users.
features: Client-server chat architecture using Python sockets
Multi-user messaging workflow for real-time communication
Tkinter-based desktop GUI for chat interactions
Structured networking logic for sending and receiving messages

projects.title: Moodify
projects.desc: Mood-based music recommendation app using emotion-aware logic for personalized playlists.
features: Emotion-driven recommendation logic for tailored playlists
Flask backend serving a dynamic web interface
MongoDB persistence for user and recommendation data
Personalized music discovery flow based on mood inputs

projects.title: Flood Shelter Recommendation System using Fuzzy Logic
projects.stack: Python, Flask, SQLite, NumPy, scikit-fuzzy, Tkinter, Bootstrap 5, Chart.js, Leaflet
projects.desc: Recommends safe flood shelters with fuzzy suitability scoring (0-100), ranked outputs, charts, map pins, and a JSON API. Supports CLI, desktop GUI, and web app interfaces.
features: Fuzzy suitability score (0-100) and ranked shelter recommendations
CLI app, Tkinter desktop GUI, and Flask web app
Interactive map with shelter pins using Leaflet + OpenStreetMap
Visual score insights with bar and radar charts (Chart.js)
SQLite-backed geolocation data with /api/recommend JSON endpoint

achievements.text: AWS Cloud Foundations, Architecting, and Data Engineering certificates
TCS iON certifications in Python Development and Deep Neural Networks
Research paper published in IEEE Xplore (2025): Context-Aware, Multimodal, Time-Adaptive, and Explainable IAP Prediction

experience.company: CSIR - Institute of Minerals and Materials Technology (IMMT), Bhubaneswar
experience.desc: Working on research and development projects within the institute.

education.degree: CBSE: Class XII and Class X
